description_long: This house features a gray stone exterior with a prominent red-tiled hip roof and multiple roof sections, giving it a classic yet substantial appearance. The front includes a small porch with white railings, potted plants, and a covered carport with a visible parked car. The rear of the house opens to a garden area with a patio, outdoor furniture, a swing set, and a small round pool, surrounded by grass and a tree. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in pairs and others as single units. The house has two visible stories, with the upper level partially set back, and the entryway is accessed by a short flight of steps leading to a modest porch. Decorative elements include a balcony, garden landscaping, and a mix of paved and grassy surfaces around the property.
description: A two-story gray stone house with a red-tiled hip roof, front porch, carport, and a landscaped backyard featuring a patio, swing set, and small pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, white railings, covered carport with a car, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, stone wall, and the transition to the backyard with visible greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a patio, outdoor furniture, swing set, tree, and a small pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, patio, and the arrangement of windows and roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped and single windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, white railings, short steps, and a covered carport adjacent to the entrance.
